ACRONYM TABLE 
 
 
Acronym Description 
Argo International profiling float network (www.argo.net) 
CORA  Coriolis Ocean Dataset for Reanalysis 
CTD Conductivity, Temperature, and Depth sensor 
FSD Falst Salty Drift 
HST  Halosteric height anomaly  
ISAS  In Situ Analysis System 
LOPS Laboratoire d’Océanographie Physique et Spatiale  
 MBT Mechanical bathythermographs 
OA Objective analysis 
PCTVAR  percentage of the product parameter variance associated to the in -
situ measurements 
PSU  PSU  
QC Quality Checks 
RMS  Root Mean Square 
SSS Sea Surface Salinity 
XBT expandable bathythermographs
